name: task-manager
description: Task CRUD tools with SQLite persistence for agent task management

tools.name: create-task
tools.description: Create a new task with title, description, priority, and assignee

tools.name: update-task
tools.description: Update an existing task's status, description, or assignee

tools.name: list-tasks
tools.description: List tasks with optional filters by status, assignee, or priority

tools.name: complete-task
tools.description: Mark a task as completed with an optional summary
